title: buddleja henryi var. hancockii
intro: Buddleja henryi var. hancockii, also known as Buddleja hancockii, is a deciduous shrub native to China, belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Buddleja henryi var. hancockii are said to include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
